articles.description: Kalapriya says that before joining the DMK, MGR was associated with the Congress. Over the time, he surrounded himself with seasoned political minds, including communist leaders K.  Baladhandayutham  and  Kalyanasundaram. He was further supported by experienced figures such as K.A. Krishnaswamy  and Panruti S. Ramachandran. This combination of cinematic influence and political acumen gave him an exceptional grasp of governance as well as mass psychology.

topStories.title: Kalapriya: from a DMK campaigner and fan of MGR to renowned littérateur
topStories.description: Kalapriya says that before joining the DMK, MGR was associated with the Congress. Over the time, he surrounded himself with seasoned political minds, including communist leaders K.  Baladhandayutham  and  Kalyanasundaram. He was further supported by experienced figures such as K.A. Krishnaswamy  and Panruti S. Ramachandran. This combination of cinematic influence and political acumen gave him an exceptional grasp of governance as well as mass psychology.

topStories.title: Prosecutor probes abuse claims against California governor candidate Swalwell
topStories.description: The high-profile Democrat, a leading contender in California's governor race, has firmly denied the accusations.

topStories.title: Tamil Nadu voter deleted from electoral roll reminds Supreme Court of promise to protect in case of ‘mass exclusion’
topStories.description: The petitioner, C. Geetha, said her name had been a mainstay in the State’s electoral roll over the years; she was even intending to contest as an independent candidate in the 51-Uthangarai (SC) Assembly Constituency and 52-Bargur Assembly Constituency in the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections in 2026.

topStories.title: Trump says 'no idea' how Iran talks will go as US-Iran meeting opens in Pakistan
topStories.description: Trump says no idea how Iran talks will go as USIran meeting opens in Pakistan

topStories.title: “Diplomacy is not an event, it’s a process, it takes time.”
topStories.description: Former Pakistani diplomat says expectations from the Islamabad talks between the US and Iran should be realistic.

topStories.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Congress releases manifesto; D.K. Shivakumar hits out at Vijay’s remarks
topStories.description: He terms the TVK president an ‘immature politician’ in response to the latter claiming that the ‘real Congress’ was with his party at a public meeting in Tirunelveli recently

topStories.title: Iran’s deputy FM says Tehran has ‘upper hand’ in talks with US
topStories.description: Iran’s Gharibabadi says Tehran has entered negotiations from a position of strength and the war on Iran has failed.

topStories.title: Rahul Gandhi, other Congress leaders to campaign in T.N. soon
topStories.description: Campaign details of party chief Kharge, Rahul, and Priyanka will be released soon, says AICC in-charge for Tamil Nadu Girish Chodankar

topStories.description: Negotiations are ongoing between US-Iranian delegations in Islamabad, with control of the strait a key sticking point.

topStories.title: Pakistan sends fighter jets to Saudi Arabia amid fragile US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: Deployment under mutual defence pact comes as Islamabad hosts US-Iran ceasefire talks.

topStories.title: US appeals court extends deadline to halt White House ballroom construction
topStories.description: Judges, however, raise questions about Trump arguments that completing the ballroom is necessary for national security.

dailyNews.title: US military ‘begins setting conditions’ for clearing mines in Strait of Hormuz after Trump's post
dailyNews.description: Earlier in the day, US President Donald Trump posted on social media that the United States military has started to clear the Strait of Hormuz, and that all of Iran's minelaying ships have been sunk

dailyNews.title: Woman sues OpenAI, says ChatGPT fuelled ex-boyfriend’s stalking behaviour after breakup
dailyNews.description: A US lawsuit alleges that ChatGPT reinforced a man’s paranoia and harassment of his ex-partner—raising fresh concerns about AI safety, accountability, and mental health risks.

dailyNews.title: Strait of Hormuz leverage looms over US-Iran talks in Islamabad
dailyNews.description: US and Iran hold first direct talks since 1979 in Islamabad, with progress hinging on the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Fuel tankers regain access to Irish oil refinery
dailyNews.description: Demonstrations due to high prices caused by the US-Israeli war against Iran are affecting traffic on several roads.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan deploys fighter jets and military personnel in Saudi Arabia amid US-Iran ceasefire talks
dailyNews.description: The deployment follows recent Iranian strikes on the Gulf nation, which damaged essential energy infrastructure and resulted in a Saudi casualty

dailyNews.title: Russia-Ukraine Orthodox Easter ceasefire begins
dailyNews.description: Both sides have agreed to observe the temporary truce, as US-led diplomatic efforts to end the war continue to stall.

dailyNews.title: On dearness allowance for staff and retirees, Supreme Court's big decision: ‘State cannot differentiate’
dailyNews.description: State can’t differentiate between serving employees and pensioners on DA: SC

dailyNews.title: Marco Rubio cancels green cards of 1979 Iran hostage crisis spokesperson Masoumeh Ebtekar's son & his family
dailyNews.description: The US State Department has taken action against Seyed Eissa Hashemi, son of 1979 Iran hostage crisis spokesperson Masoumeh Ebtekar, and his family, who are set to be deported. Rubio stated ‘anti-American terrorists or their families’ should not reside in the US.

dailyNews.title: Who is Amanda Ungaro, the woman now at the centre of Melania Trump–Epstein buzz?
dailyNews.description: A cryptic social media warning, past links to Trump’s inner circle, and claims tied to the Epstein controversy have pushed Amanda Ungaro into the spotlight.

dailyNews.title: Machete-wielding man killed by police in New York’s Grand Central station
dailyNews.description: Three elderly victims were wounded at the transit hub attack as authorities continue to investigate, police said.

dailyNews.title: Coachella kicks off with Sabrina Carpenter and surprise guests
dailyNews.description: The festival in California was also forced to cancel a set by DJ Anyma on Friday because of strong winds.

topStories.description: The immigration judges’ abrupt dismissals marked the latest efforts by the Trump administration to reshape the country’s immigration courts.

topStories.title: Postal Service, Under Pressure, Now Faces Trump’s Mail Ballot Order
topStories.description: President Trump’s executive order, which has been challenged as unconstitutional, would limit the Postal Service to sending only the ballots of voters deemed eligible.

topStories.description: American power can survive America’s recurring overreach.

topStories.title: Judge told to reconsider security implications of halting White House ballroom
topStories.description: The U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit said it did not have enough information to decide how much of the project can be suspended without jeopardizing the safety of the president.

topStories.title: Pope Leo issues latest rebuke of Iran conflict: "Enough with war!"
topStories.description: Pope Leo XIV offered his strongest condemnation yet of the war in Iran on Saturday, appearing to take multiple veiled shots at President Trump.

dailyNews.title: How Persian Gulf nations are reacting to the U.S. and Iran's temporary ceasefire
dailyNews.description: U.S. officials are meeting Iranian and Pakistani officials in Islamabad on Saturday in direct talks, the White House says. CBS News' Haley Ott has more on the global reaction to the two-week ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. is "clearing out" the Strait of Hormuz as U.S., Iranian officials meet in Pakistan
dailyNews.description: President Trump said the U.S. is "clearing out" the Strait of Hormuz on social media Saturday. Meanwhile, U.S. officials are meeting face-to-face with Iranian and Pakistani officials in Islamabad. CBS News' Taurean Small has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Trump praises Palantir as stock has worst week in over a year and Iran conflict drags on
dailyNews.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.

dailyNews.title: U.S. oil slips below $100 as Trump demands reopening of Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump's 250-foot 'triumphal arch' would loom over Potomac, new renderings show
dailyNews.description: Rep. Don Beyer said "President Trump is focused on a taxpayer-funded vanity project that would choke traffic, block our skyline, and tower over sacred ground."

dailyNews.title: Trump policies, China's biotech boom are ending Europe's pharma powerhouse era
dailyNews.description: Companies have long lamented Europe's fragmented capital markets, single-market adoption on pricing and clinical trials, and uneven reimbursement policies.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: High-stakes US-Iran-Pakistan talks continue
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Trump says Iran doing 'very poor job' of allowing oil through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump accused Iran of violating its agreement with the U.S. over the Strait of Hormuz, saying on Thursday that it was "doing a poor job" of allowing oil to pass through the waterway.
